title: CORRECTED 2026-07-16 (was L2 0.85): production verdict parsing is ALREADY sentinel-mandatory (PhaseIO=StageEnforce default; cmd_cycle.go:367-368; ship rejects foreign-phase sentinels; 32/32 coverage). Residual = OPTIONAL refactor: synthesize the verdict word from gate results so prose/sentinel becomes explanation-only; no leak remains.
summary: OPERATOR VERIFICATION 2026-07-16 corrected the architecture-review L2 finding: the 'dormant StageOff sentinel' evidence was audit.NewDefault — a test/registry convenience with no production caller. The real composition root (cmd_cycle.go:367 audit.NewDefaultWithStageCompact(br,prm,cfg.PhaseIO,...) and :368 ship.NewWithDefaultRunnerStage(cfg.PhaseIO)) passes cfg.PhaseIO which defaults StageEnforce since the 3.10 cutover — so the machine sentinel is MANDATORY at both parse sites (audit extractAuditVerdict gates the regex fallback off >= enforce; ship parseVerdicts is sentinel-first, requires sentinel.Phase=='audit', and a missing/foreign sentinel fails closed as CodeAuditBindingMalformed). Measured sentinel coverage: 32/32 recent audited cycles. What SURVIVES of the original idea (and why this item stays queued at 0.4): the sentinel is still the AGENT's claim — synthesizing the verdict word in Go from the deterministic gate results (EGPS red_count + CI-parity + strict_audit promotion), with agent prose demoted to explanation, would remove even that claim from the control path. That is a tidiness/defense-in-depth refactor, NOT a leak: gates already override FAIL-ward and EGPS re-checks at ship.
acceptance: audit's final verdict is computed in Go from the deterministic gate results (EGPS + CI-parity + strict_audit promotion), with the LLM narrative verdict recorded as advisory explanation only — a prose/gate disagreement logs the divergence and the GATE result wins
the verdict sentinel path (EVOLVE_PHASE_IO / verdict-sentinel stage) flipped to enforce after a shadow-divergence soak shows ~0 prose-vs-gate disagreements (telemetry first, flip second)
regression: a narrative PASS over a red_count>0 worktree records FAIL (already true via EGPS — pin it with a test at the new synthesis site)
go test -race ./internal/phases/audit/... green; no change to the ship audit-binding contract
source: operator static-vs-dynamic architecture review 2026-07-16 (architect agent, evidence-based; L2 = the highest-value default-disarmed clamp)
